data.name: Seek Girl Ⅱ
data.detailed_description:
加入社區

點擊边栏加入“访问网站”

遊戲介紹

這款遊戲是一個智力休閒小遊戲，一次不重複的路徑吃掉所有兔子，就可以解鎖美少女了。（兔兔這麼可愛為什麼要吃兔兔〜）

作為seekgirl的延續之作，當然要延續前座的優良的品質啦！

12幅高質量角色!!

全live2d動態圖片！四種狀態任意切換，比前作更棒。

全語音，每個角色都有自己獨特的語音！

data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA Gef
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device

data.name: Seek Girl Ⅱ
data.detailed_description:
Join the Discord

We have now opened the discord community, if you have any questions(￣y▽,￣)╭, please click the discord link on the right of (that is, support language below) join us ┏(゜ω ゜)=☞

Do you have any questions? I guess you have! !

This game is a smart casual game. You can unlock beautiful girls without eating all the rabbits.

As a continuation of the seekgirl, of course, we must continue the excellent quality of the front seat!

12 high quality beautiful girls! !

Full live2d dynamic picture!! Four states can be switched at will, which is better than the previous one.

Full voice, each character has its own unique voice!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10
